experiences.title: Account Manager - South West London
experiences.description:
Account Manager for South West London specialising in SME's
Dealing predominantly with direct clients and agencies
Selling advertising space on one of the worlds most renowned out of home media portfolios the London underground along with London bus and national rail

experiences.title: Regional Commercial Manager
experiences.description:
Selling digital signage systems in North and Central London
Selling advertising space on the digital signage network that I have developed to public services 
Selling digital campaigns on three separate networks including shopping malls, doctors surgeries and schools

recommendations:
Paul Vitali

Alex proved himself as a self-motivated, driven, trustworthy employee who quickly established himself as a main player in our organisation; over achieving on sales targets and delivering the highest profit margins.

Laura Saunders

Alex was a fantastic Account Manager. He was very assertive and thorough and exceeded all expectations. It was a pleasure working with him.
